rules.rule: IO operations (STEP, STL, IGES, glTF, DXF, 3MF, OBJ, SVG) must go through the kernel abstraction. Don't access OCCT reader/writer APIs directly.

Export functions live in *ExportFns.ts files (dxfExportFns, threemfExportFns, gltfExportFns, objExportFns). Import functions live in *ImportFns.ts files (importFns, dxfImportFns, objImportFns, threemfImportFns, svgImportFns). Follow existing patterns: functional API, Result return type, proper WASM resource cleanup.
